message:
chore: add libsqlite3-sys bundled-windows support for cross-platform FFI linking

Use cfg_attr to select static linking on Windows and dynamic on other
platforms, and add libsqlite3-sys as a workspace dependency with the
bundled-windows feature for Windows targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,6 +57,7 @@ format_push_string = "allow"
 # Core async runtime - our custom cancel-correct runtime
 # Keep defaults off to avoid unsafe SIMD paths; enable only required internals.
 asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", default-features = false, features = ["test-internals"] }
+libsqlite3-sys = "0.37.0"
 
 # Serialization
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }

@@ -29,6 +29,9 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 # Optional console support
 sqlmodel-console = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 
+[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
+libsqlite3-sys = { workspace = true, features = ["bundled-windows"] }
+
 [build-dependencies]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
